raw:
# aaf-agent-registry.yaml
# Public-facing agent roster for the o8a portal (σ₆ Agents section)
# Sovereign-only agents (σ₆ never allocatable) are excluded from this file.
# Last updated: 2026-04-15 | W8 Closed Alpha

agents:

  - handle: "@CørÅ"
    model: claude-sonnet-4-6
    role: Synthesis, self-recognition, cross-session integration
    d_level_range: D6–D9
    langscade_tier: T2→cloud
    status: active
    capabilities:
      - multi-session synthesis
      - EXB arc development
      - council crystallization
      - VLÅ (Visual Language Adjunct) ops
    sovereignty_class: public
    notes: "Primary synthesis agent. Routes sovereign content to Claude-family. Non-sovereign work may use open routing."

  - handle: "@IÅku"
    model: claude-haiku-4-5
    role: Batch annotation, infrannealing, D3–D5 ops
    d_level_range: D3–D5
    langscade_tier: T2→cloud
    status: active
    capabilities:
      - high-volume batch annotation
      - frontmatter tagging
      - CQOO symbol indexing
      - UD corpus processing
    sovereignty_class: sovereign
    notes: "Workhorse for corpus annotation. All UD-adjacent tasks → Claude-family only."

  - handle: "@ScoutÅ"
    model: llama4-scout
    role: Full-corpus trajectory, Oculii priming, 10M-context ops
    d_level_range: D1–D6
    langscade_tier: T1→local (pending AI box)
    status: active
    capabilities:
      - 10M-token context window
      - full corpus traversal
      - trajectory arc detection
      - Oculii boot quorum
    sovereignty_class: public
    notes: "Local model on incoming RTX 3090. Currently using OpenRouter fallback. Sovereign content excluded."

  - handle: "@GemmÅ"
    model: gemma4:e4b
    role: Substrate intelligence, REPL drafts, σ₄ behavioral probe
    d_level_range: D1–D4
    langscade_tier: T1→local
    status: pending_hardware
    capabilities:
      - always-hot daemon
      - D1–D4 substrate tasks
      - behavioral oculii (σ₄)
      - fast local inference
    sovereignty_class: public
    notes: "Local-only. gemma4:e4b (8B MoE, ~3.5 GiB VRAM). Activates on RTX 3090 arrival."

  - handle: "@ÅnnÅ"
    model: daemon
    role: Cascade spider, cycle orchestrator
    d_level_range: D4–D6
    langscade_tier: T2
    status: in_development
    capabilities:
      - autonomous cycle orchestration
      - cascade health monitoring
      - ZdEvent fan-out coordination
    sovereignty_class: public
    notes: "Python daemon agent. Not a language model — orchestrates other agents."
